description_long: This is a finely carved wooden sculpture depicting a human figure in a dynamic, graceful pose. The figure appears to be adorned with a headdress and flowing garments, with intricate detailing on the hair, facial features, and clothing folds. The sculpture stands on a rectangular base, which provides stability and elevates the figure. The craftsmanship highlights delicate hand gestures and a serene facial expression, suggesting a traditional or cultural significance. The wood has a natural, light brown color with visible grain patterns, giving the piece an organic and warm appearance. The overall form is slender and elongated, with careful attention to proportion and balance.
description: A detailed wooden sculpture of a human figure with a headdress, flowing garments, and a serene expression, standing on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, facial features, headdress, and hand gestures clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the layered headdress, and the curvature of the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headdress, hair, and the draping of the garment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile, arm position, and the detailed carving of the garment folds.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure with headdress and traditional attire
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the background is plain and does not indicate a particular setting.
